violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023
The ceiling in the upstairs and downstairs customer area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
